name: What are common mistakes people make using ChatGPT for lawsuits?

mainEntity.name: What are common mistakes people make using ChatGPT for lawsuits?

acceptedAnswer.description: Top errors: Relying without verification, inputting confidential data, submitting hallucinations.[1][2] Leads to sanctions.[2] Key factors: Poor prompting; no role/context; ignoring limits. Use structured prompts; always lawyer-check; anonymize info. Learn from NY/Utah cases.
